address: Windermere Business Center, 6735 Conroy Rd STE 104
reviews: The color work here is incredible. My balayage looks natural and beautiful — exactly what I envisioned.
The atmosphere is serene, the team is talented, and the results speak for themselves.
Finally found a salon that truly listens. Every visit feels like self-care, not just a haircut.
description: Sanctuary Salon & Med Spa is a sanctuary for self-care and style. Our expert stylists combine artistry with the finest products to create looks that are uniquely you. Experience beauty at its finest.
